title: SyncSwap - Open App
meta_description: syncswap opens the official swap route to connect a wallet, review price impact, and trade tokens on supported ZK rollups.
hero_h2: Trade tokens through routed ZK liquidity
hero_lead: SyncSwap is the official decentralized exchange app for swapping tokens across supported Ethereum ZK rollups with routed execution, liquidity pools, and wallet-based settlement.
what_is: SyncSwap is a decentralized exchange and liquidity hub for Ethereum ZK rollups, described in the official docs as infrastructure for token swaps, liquidity management, and DeFi access.

how.d: Use the official syncswap.xyz app route and connect a wallet on a supported network.
Select the token to spend and the token to receive, then enter the amount to load price and route details.
Check output, minimum received, price impact, pool route, and network gas before approving.
Approve the token if required, submit the swap in your wallet, and wait for the network confirmation.

points.p: The app uses routing across available pools to seek an efficient execution path for the selected trade.
Protocol docs describe Classic, Stable, Aqua, and Range pool models for different asset and liquidity conditions.
Docs list live support for ZKsync Era, Linea, Scroll, Sophon, and Creator Chain; check the app before transacting.

faq.a: SyncSwap is used to swap tokens and access liquidity features on supported Ethereum ZK rollups, with details available in the official documentation.
This landing page is not the app; the official links page lists syncswap.xyz as the primary website, so verify the domain before connecting a wallet.
The docs list ZKsync Era, Linea, Scroll, Sophon, and Creator Chain as supported ZK rollups; availability can change, so confirm inside the app.

faq.q: Does SyncSwap show slippage and price impact?
faq.a: Yes. The trading guide describes price impact, minimum received, and route details that should be reviewed before confirming a swap.

faq.q: Do I need a wallet for SyncSwap?
faq.a: Yes. Token swaps are wallet-based transactions, so you need a compatible wallet and gas on the selected network.

footer_note: This is not the official app; verify syncswap.xyz before connecting a wallet. Educational content only, not financial advice.
